prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-PRB18THSFRT-11PC-IR-TT Product Type: ROUTER_BIT Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Mini Router Bits Set for Rotary Tools Heat Treated Carbon Steel 10pc Description: The ToolTreaux mini router bits kit comes with 6 different shapes for a variety of uses with dremel and rotary tools: trim, V groove, straight, cove, slot cutter and beading. These mini router bits are ideal for detailed precision work like building model trains and planes, dollhouse furniture and more.

All of the included router bits feature a 1/8 inch shank that is compatible with most dremel and rotary tools. Easily insert them into your mini-grinding tool. They are made of durable heat-treated carbon steel for superior strength that will ensure a long service life.

Our set of drill router bits come with a stylish, convenient wooden storage case to keep them organized and secured when not in use. Easily store your drill bits with your other hobby tools and crafting supplies. This is a must-have set of drill bits for dremel and rotary tool owners. Search Terms: abrasive rotary wheels rotary tools tools accessories grinding wheel sanding wheel sanding tool grinding tool cutting discs rotary cutter rotary tool rotary cutter for fabric nail drill drill bit set cordless drill drill set Features: - 6 MINI ROUTER BIT SHAPES - ToolTreaux 10pc mini router bits set comes with 6 different shapes for a variety of uses: straight, trim, V groove, beading, cove and slot cutter; Ideal for detailed work like building model trains and planes, dollhouse furniture and mini buildings - 1/8 INCH SHANK - All included router bits feature 1/8" (3mm) shank that fits most rotary tools; easily insert into mini-grinding tools; 1.5" length; compatible with most standard rotary and dremel tools - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Mini router bits are made of high-quality heat-treated carbon steel for superior strength and durability to ensure a long service life - WOODEN STORAGE CASE INCLUDED - Set of router bits comes with convenient wooden storage case to keep tools organized and secured when not in use; easily store your bits with other hobby tools and crafting supplies - SPECIFICATIONS - Number of pieces: 10; Materials: heat-treated carbon steel, wood; Storage case included: Shank size: 1/8" (3mm); Dimensions of storage case: 4" x 4" x 1" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
